scope.target: Inventory current AI assets and define taxonomy
constraints: Do not move existing assets yet
Use repo-observable paths and current file structure

inputs.architecture_target: Create an accurate inventory and taxonomy for portable AI assets
user_constraints: The workflow should proceed stage by stage with commits
Confirm wrapper paths for Claude, Codex, Gemini, and GitHub Copilot

steps: Grouped .ai/prompts into command families, review/generation/test packages, shared fragments, and examples
Grouped .ai/scripts into review, validation, generated, and support assets
Confirmed currently existing and expected repo-level wrapper interfaces for Claude, Codex, Gemini, and GitHub Copilot
validation: Inventory is based on current files in the repository
Taxonomy distinguishes canonical candidates from wrapper-specific content and human-facing guides
deferred_items: Define wrapper directory structure and generation strategy

results.summary: Completed Stage 1 inventory and taxonomy for portable AI assets.
